title: (Bullish Signal) KNDI, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on Nov 02, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeon A.I.dvisor found 50 similar cases, and 42 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 84%. Current price $6.90 crossed the resistance line at $6.78 and is trading between $7.00 resistance and $6.78 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 10/01/20 - 11/02/20, the price experienced a +10% Uptrend, while the week of 10/26/20 - 11/02/20 shows a -2% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/tirrvtx683x51.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=3ef1c486180a6ec7212ff9dc7368e8c3520f839d

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator shows that the ticker has stayed in the oversold zone for 7 days. The price of this ticker is presumed to bounce back soon, since the longer the ticker stays in the oversold zone, the more promptly an upward trend is expected.

The 10-day Moving Average for KNDI crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 14, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeon A.I. detected that in 14 of 19 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

Following a +3.04% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where KNDI advanced for three days, in 167 of 218 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

KNDI may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeon A.I. detected that in 81 of 108 cases where KNDI Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 75%.
